features: Bar Soap Spring Bag Usage:Collect small pieces of soap that are almost used up and difficult to grip and place in a washcloth exfoliating to use normally for lathering

Soap Travel Holder: You can take bar soap exfoliating pouch when travelling or on business so you can use your own cleaning and hygiene bath products,mesh rope cover should be washed after use and then hung directly on the bathroom hook
Multifunctional for Exfoliating Scrubber:Soap Container is multifunctional for collecting small toys, jewellery, cosmetics as a small drawstring mesh bags
Soap Sheets Loofah Sleeves: Soap sponge is made of soft and flexible mesh nylon,mini draw string bags is delicate and offers a gentle massage to your skin. Especially suitable for sensitive skin
Soap Pocket Quantity: 2 piece set body scrubber shower sponge has an elastic band drawstring.Soap dishes dispensers for foaming and drying soap quickly to make soap last longer
description: Product description Category: Soap bar holder bags Colour: Grey and Black Material: Mesh Function: Exfoliates, clean skin, stores soap, hook design Product Size: Length 19.5~21 cm, width 11~12 cm Packing list: 2 pcs × bath sponges bag Directions 1. Collect small pieces of soap that are almost used up and difficult to grip and place in the washcloth or exfoliating scrubber. 2. Use the soap container when traveling or on business to carry your own cleaning and hygiene bath products. After use, wash the mesh rope cover and hang it directly on the bathroom hook. 3. Use the soap sponge as a multifunctional exfoliating scrubber for collecting small toys, jewelry, or cosmetics. 4. The soap sponge is made of soft and flexible mesh nylon, offering a gentle massage to your skin. It is especially suitable for sensitive skin. 5. The soap pocket has an elastic band drawstring for quick foaming and drying soap, making soap last longer. Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes and skin. Rinse thoroughly after use and allow to dry completely between uses to prevent bacterial growth. Keep out of reach of children. See more
